title: Section 171
content: Every order granting, refusing, suspending, revoking, or modifying a licence under section 169 or section 170, as the case may be, shall be, in writing, shall state the ground on which it proceeds, shall be published on the notice board of the office of the Nagar Panchayat or the Council and shall also be served on the owner of the premises concerned within fourteen days of the order.
